stories.headline_en: Cori Hornbæk hotel restores Danish gem
stories.headline_de: Cori Hornbæk Hotel restauriert dänisches Juwel
stories.summary_en: A new coastal hotel in Zealand revives a functionalist Danish Riviera building. The restoration returns the architectural landmark to its original state.
stories.summary_de: Ein neues Küstenhotel in Seeland belebt ein funktionalistisches Gebäude an der Dänischen Riviera wieder. Die Restaurierung stellt das architektonische Wahrzeichen in seinen ursprünglichen Zustand zurück.

stories.headline_en: Templon Gallery Closes NY Outpost
stories.headline_de: Templon Gallery schließt NY-Dependance
stories.summary_en: Templon Gallery has closed its New York outpost. Tone Hansen takes on a leadership role at Moderna Museet.
stories.summary_de: Templon Gallery hat ihre New York-Dependance geschlossen. Tone Hansen übernimmt eine Führungsposition im Moderna Museet.

stories.headline_en: Schloss Bellevue renovation underway
stories.headline_de: Sanierung Schloss Bellevue läuft
stories.summary_en: Schloss Bellevue is undergoing renovation, requiring the German federal president to temporarily relocate to a new office building at an estimated cost of around one billion. Art programming is now visible in the interim

stories.headline_en: MacCulloch examines Christian sexual ethics
stories.headline_de: MacCulloch erforscht christliche Sexualmoral
stories.summary_en: Church historian Diarmaid MacCulloch's book "Niedriger als die Engel" recounts Christianity's history as a succession of sexual and anti-sexual revolutions. The narrative remains open-ended.
stories.summary_de: Das Buch "Niedriger als die Engel" des Kirchenhistorikers Diarmaid MacCulloch erzählt die Geschichte des Christentums als Abfolge von sexuellen und antisexuellen Revolutionen. Das Narrativ bleibt offen.

stories.headline_en: Debate on Yad Vashem satellite sites
stories.headline_de: Debatte über Yad-Vashem-Außenstellen

stories.headline_en: Racheal Crowther at Chisenhale Gallery
stories.headline_de: Racheal Crowther in der Chisenhale Gallery
stories.summary_en: A multisensory exhibition by Racheal Crowther at Chisenhale Gallery examines how systems of care are entangled within state, corporate and military infrastructure.
stories.summary_de: Eine multisensorische Ausstellung von Racheal Crowther in der Chisenhale Gallery untersucht, wie Versorgungssysteme mit staatlicher, korporativer und militärischer Infrastruktur verflochten sind.

stories.headline_en: Oriol Vilanova on Spain's Venice Biennale Role
stories.headline_de: Oriol Vilanova zu Spaniens Rolle auf der Venedig Biennale
stories.summary_en: Spanish representative Oriol Vilanova questions the centrality of the Venice Biennale itself. He states the event is not, or has not been, the important thing.
stories.summary_de: Der spanische Vertreter Oriol Vilanova stellt die Zentralität der Venedig Biennale selbst in Frage. Er erklärt, dass das Event nicht wichtig ist oder war.

stories.headline_en: Eglė Budvytytė on Lithuania at Venice Biennale
stories.headline_de: Eglė Budvytytė zu Litauen auf der Venedig Biennale
stories.summary_en: Lithuanian representative Eglė Budvytytė acknowledges the Biennale's continued appeal while questioning its ethics. She notes the event maintains appeal, though not universally, despite ethical concerns.
stories.summary_de: Litauens Vertreterin Eglė Budvytytė würdigt den anhaltenden Reiz der Biennale, stellt aber ihre Ethik in Frage. Sie bemerkt, dass das Event Reiz behält, obwohl die Ethik zusammengebrochen ist.

stories.headline_en: Malta on Soft Power vs. Art at Venice Biennale

stories.summary_en: Malta's representatives identify tension between the Biennale as soft power exercise and as a space for contemporary art production and display. They note these two roles do not align well together.
stories.summary_de: Maltas Vertreter identifizieren eine Spannung zwischen der Biennale als Soft-Power-Instrument und als Raum für zeitgenössische Kunstproduktion. Die beiden Rollen gehen nicht gut zusammen.

stories.headline_en: RojoNegro on Indigenous Peoples at Venice Biennale

stories.summary_en: RojoNegro, representing Mexico, states a historical debt to Indigenous peoples who protect resources and ecosystems. The statement frames Indigenous stewardship as central to their representation.

stories.headline_en: FotoFocus opens inaugural exhibition in Cincinnati

stories.headline_en: Baselitz final exhibition at White Cube Bermondsey

stories.summary_en: Georg Baselitz's final paintings and drawings are on view at White Cube Bermondsey in London, addressing themes of mortality and death. The German painter, who died in April aged 88, created this body of work as a final
stories.summary_de: Georg Baselitz' letzte Arbeiten sind in White Cube Bermondsey in London zu sehen und behandeln Sterblichkeit. Der deutsche Maler starb im April im Alter von 88 Jahren.

stories.headline_en: Vitra debuts tailored 'Bascule' lounge chair
stories.headline_de: Vitra präsentiert Loungesessel 'Bascule'

stories.headline_en: Artists protest US immigration enforcement at World Cup
stories.headline_de: Künstler protestieren gegen US-Einwanderungsdurchsetzung bei World Cup
stories.summary_en: The "No Ice in the Cup" campaign uses art to protest the planned deployment of US Immigration and Customs Enforcement agents to the football tournament. Artists are creating posters as part of the protest effort.

stories.headline_en: Shihara: minimalist jewellery design
stories.headline_de: Shihara: minimalistische Schmuckgestaltung
stories.summary_en: Tokyo-based brand Shihara specializes in minimalist jewellery with clean lines and fuss-free design.

stories.summary_de: Das persönliche Cello des Landschaftsmalers John Constable, 1802 angefertigt, wird nach seiner Restaurierung öffentlich gespielt. Constable war auch ein begeisterter Musiker, der das Instrument vermutlich in seinem Heima

stories.summary_de: Aston Martin und Curv Racing Simulator präsentieren die AMR-C01-R Hypercar Edition, eine Rennmaschine für zu Hause, inspiriert vom Aston Martin Valkyrie. Der Endurance-Simulator bringt Rennleistung ins Wohnzimmer.

stories.headline_en: New rural house completed in Mornington Peninsula

stories.headline_en: India leads as Asian art markets experience sharp repricing

stories.headline_en: Frankfurt opens its studios

stories.headline_en: Marilyn Monroe exhibition at National Portrait Gallery

stories.headline_en: Dutch Court Sentences Museum Heist Thieves

stories.headline_en: Thomas Rom on top Venice Biennale exhibitions

stories.headline_en: Cincinnati opens permanent photography museum

stories.headline_en: Richter wins German non-fiction prize

stories.headline_en: Pulp frontman Jarvis Cocker to curate UK exhibition

stories.summary_en: Jarvis Cocker will co-organise an art exhibition at the Hepworth Wakefield next year. The musician describes his curatorial approach as a 'hodge podge'.

stories.headline_en: Pride Month 2026: LGBTQIA+ art exhibitions and events
stories.headline_de: Pride Month 2026: LGBTQIA+ Kunstausstellungen und Events
stories.summary_en: Aesthetica is spotlighting art exhibitions and events for Pride Month 2026 that address LGBTQIA+ history, equality and queer love. The publication highlights top exhibitions across the month of June.
stories.summary_de: Aesthetica präsentiert Kunstausstellungen und Events für Pride Month 2026, die sich mit LGBTQIA+ Geschichte, Gleichberechtigung und queerer Liebe befassen. Die Publikation hebt führende Ausstellungen im Juni hervor.

stories.headline_en: Bangalter creates music for art projects
stories.headline_de: Bangalter schafft Musik für Kunstprojekte
stories.summary_en: French artist Thomas Bangalter has created music for a ballet and a sound component for a public art project in Paris. The musician discusses his approach to creating work for artistic collaborations.
stories.summary_de: Der französische Künstler Thomas Bangalter hat Musik für ein Ballett und eine Soundkomponente für ein öffentliches Kunstprojekt in Paris geschaffen. Der Musiker diskutiert seinen Ansatz.

stories.headline_en: MA Arts and Cultural Enterprise at Central Saint Martins
stories.headline_de: MA Arts and Cultural Enterprise an der Central Saint Martins
stories.summary_en: Central Saint Martins offers a flexible, part-time online Masters in Arts and Cultural Enterprise. The program develops business and cultural management skills.
stories.summary_de: Central Saint Martins bietet einen flexiblen, berufsbegleitenden Online-Master in Arts and Cultural Enterprise an. Das Programm entwickelt Geschäfts- und Kulturmanagement-Kompetenzen.

stories.headline_en: Native Performance Art Exhibition Opens June 2026
stories.headline_de: Ausstellung zu Native Performance Art öffnet Juni 2026
stories.summary_en: Grounding performance as the foundation of contemporary Native Art, this exhibition features live presentations. On view at SITE Santa Fe June 5–September 7, 2026.
stories.summary_de: Diese Ausstellung mit Live-Präsentationen stellt Performance als Grundlage zeitgenössischer Native Art dar. Zu sehen im SITE Santa Fe vom 5. Juni bis 7. September 2026.

stories.headline_en: MoMA pairs Mondrian's boogie woogie masterworks in 2027
stories.headline_de: MoMA zeigt Mondrians Boogie-Woogie-Meisterwerke 2027

stories.headline_en: Sagrada Família tourism strains Barcelona
stories.headline_de: Sagrada Família Tourismus belastet Barcelona
stories.summary_en: Barcelona's tourism manager envisions Sagrada Família as Europe's "Taj Mahal," but local residents express concern about overcrowding. A papal blessing visit does little to ease local apprehension.

stories.headline_en: Sagrada Família nears completion as debate continues
stories.headline_de: Sagrada Família rückt der Vollendung näher
stories.summary_en: The completion of Antoni Gaudí's Sagrada Família becomes visible as it approaches the 100th anniversary of the architect's death. Critics have called the ongoing work a "religious theme park," raising questions about Gau

stories.headline_en: ZPS serves swastika from vegan mince
stories.headline_de: ZPS serviert Hakenkreuz aus veganem Hack
stories.summary_en: Artist collective ZPS presented a provocative work involving a swastika made from vegan mince. The work was directed at the AfD party.
stories.summary_de: Das Künstlerkollektiv ZPS präsentierte ein provokatives Werk mit einem Hakenkreuz aus veganem Hack. Das Werk war an die AfD-Partei gerichtet.

stories.headline_en: Modigliani work to sell at Sotheby's
stories.headline_de: Modigliani-Werk geht bei Sotheby's zu Hammer
stories.summary_en: A Modigliani work estimated at $60 million will be offered at Sotheby's London sales later this month. The painting was previously in an exhibition that was shuttered for indecency.

stories.headline_en: Jayden Ali & Simone Brewster in Conversation
stories.headline_de: Jayden Ali & Simone Brewster im Gespräch
stories.summary_en: ArtReview and Ursula host a conversation with Jayden Ali and Simone Brewster on Tuesday 9 June. The event is titled Off the Record.
stories.summary_de: ArtReview und Ursula veranstalten ein Gespräch mit Jayden Ali und Simone Brewster am Dienstag, 9. Juni. Das Event heißt Off the Record.

stories.headline_en: Two actors perform Beckett's "How it is" for six hours
stories.headline_de: Zwei Schauspieler performen Becketts "How it is" für sechs Stunden
stories.summary_en: Actors Conor Lovett and Stephen Dillane perform Samuel Beckett's text "How it is" about human existential madness in a Venetian palazzo. The six-hour performance reflects Beckett's artistic sensibility.

stories.headline_en: Artists reject AI 'slop' with imperfect handmade work
stories.headline_de: Künstler lehnen KI-‚Slop' mit handgemachten Werken ab

stories.headline_en: Miriam Davoudvandi on poverty and social mobility
stories.headline_de: Miriam Davoudvandi zu Armut und sozialer Mobilität
stories.summary_en: Miriam Davoudvandi has written a bestseller examining what it means to live without wealth in Germany. The book questions the promise of social advancement.
stories.summary_de: Miriam Davoudvandi hat einen Bestseller geschrieben, der untersucht, was es bedeutet, in Deutschland ohne Wohlstand zu leben. Das Buch hinterfragt das Versprechen des sozialen Aufstiegs.

stories.headline_en: Julio Le Parc retrospective brings 1960s Paris to Tate
stories.headline_de: Julio-Le-Parc-Retrospektive bringt 1960er-Paris zur Tate

stories.headline_en: Future Now Symposium 2026: 12th edition programme
stories.headline_de: Future Now Symposium 2026: Programm der 12. Ausgabe
stories.summary_en: The 12th edition of Future Now Symposium returns with talks from award-winning artists engaging with themes of rapid global change. The full programme has been announced.
stories.summary_de: Die 12. Ausgabe des Future Now Symposiums kehrt mit Vorträgen von preisgekrönten Künstlern zurück, die sich mit Themen des schnellen globalen Wandels befassen. Das vollständige Programm wurde angekündigt.

stories.headline_en: Royal Copenhagen revives Triton collection
stories.headline_de: Royal Copenhagen belebt Triton-Kollektion neu
stories.summary_en: Royal Copenhagen reintroduces Triton, a porcelain collection debuted fifty years ago, at 3 Days of Design. The technically ambitious vessels were inspired by Greco-Roman mythology and the sea.
stories.summary_de: Royal Copenhagen führt Triton, eine vor fünfzig Jahren debütierte Porzellankollektion, bei 3 Days of Design wieder ein. Die technisch ehrgeizigen Gefäße waren von der greco-römischen Mythologie und dem Meer inspiriert.

stories.headline_en: Leonardotheka project reconstructs da Vinci manuscripts
stories.headline_de: Leonardotheka-Projekt rekonstruiert da-Vinci-Manuskripte

stories.headline_en: Tone Hansen Appointed Director of Moderna Museet
stories.headline_de: Tone Hansen neue Direktorin Moderna Museet
stories.summary_en: Tone Hansen has been appointed director of Moderna Museet. Hansen previously served as director of MUNCH in Oslo since 2022.
stories.summary_de: Tone Hansen wurde zur Direktorin des Moderna Museet ernannt. Hansen war seit 2022 Direktorin des MUNCH in Oslo.

stories.headline_en: Four Seasons opens in Cartagena
stories.headline_de: Four Seasons eröffnet in Cartagena
stories.summary_en: A restoration project transforms 14th-century cloisters and the original Club Cartagena into Four Seasons Cartagena. The new five-star hotel is now open in the city.

stories.headline_en: Ceramics heritage site seeks emergency funding

stories.headline_en: Gucci Launches Paparazzo Handbag
stories.headline_de: Gucci präsentiert Paparazzo-Handtasche
stories.summary_en: Gucci debuts the Paparazzo bag, referencing slouchy 1990s and 2000s LA styles. The design marks a new era under Demna, defined as bold and unapologetically sexy.

stories.headline_en: OBEN Creates Sculptural Sound Pieces
stories.headline_de: OBEN kreiert skulpturale Soundkunstwerke
stories.summary_en: LA-based OBEN Hi-Fi merges audio and art through custom speakers and one-off commissions. The collection distinguishes the firm in the high-end audio market.

stories.headline_en: Jenny Wu on the enduring popularity of Nancy Holt
stories.headline_de: Jenny Wu über die anhaltende Popularität von Nancy Holt
stories.summary_en: ArtReview examines what drives the enduring popularity of artist Nancy Holt. Jenny Wu finds an example of art's tunnel vision in the desert.
stories.summary_de: ArtReview untersucht, was die anhaltende Popularität der Künstlerin Nancy Holt antreibt. Jenny Wu findet ein Beispiel für Kunsttunnelblick in der Wüste.

stories.headline_en: Balmuda launches NatureWind Studio fan in US
stories.headline_de: Balmuda bringt NatureWind Studio Ventilator in USA
stories.summary_en: Japanese manufacturer Balmuda is entering the US market with its NatureWind Studio fan. The high-end device marks the brand's expansion into new territory.

stories.headline_en: Painter Jamie Nares featured in Pride Month series
stories.headline_de: Maler Jamie Nares in Pride-Month-Serie
stories.summary_en: Hyperallergic kicks off its Pride Month series with painter Jamie Nares. A sports betting company enters the art market for the first time.
stories.summary_de: Hyperallergic startet seine Pride-Month-Serie mit Maler Jamie Nares. Ein Sportwettenunternehmen betritt erstmals den Kunstmarkt.

stories.headline_en: AI platform Artlas expands museum pilot programs
stories.headline_de: KI-Plattform Artlas erweitert Museumspiloten
stories.summary_en: Artlas, an AI cultural companion platform, is expanding its presence across museums in Asia and the US. The founder argues institutions should adopt trusted AI tools for visitor engagement.
stories.summary_de: Artlas, eine KI-Kulturbegleit-Plattform, erweitert ihre Präsenz in Museen in Asien und den USA. Der Gründer argumentiert, dass Institutionen vertrauenswürdige KI-Tools einsetzen sollten.

stories.headline_en: Austin Kleon on rediscovering creativity and play
stories.headline_de: Austin Kleon über kreative Neuentdeckung
stories.summary_en: Author Austin Kleon, who wrote 'Steal Like an Artist,' offers guidance on reigniting creativity by embracing playfulness. The advice draws on lessons from children's approach to imagination.
stories.summary_de: Autor Austin Kleon, Verfasser von 'Steal Like an Artist', gibt Ratschläge zur Neuentzündung der Kreativität durch Verspielheit. Die Tipps basieren auf kindlichen Herangehensweisen.

stories.headline_en: Kiah Celeste's sculpture finds elegance in everyday

stories.summary_en: Kiah Celeste's sculptural work on view at the Studio Museum explores the familiar made transcendent. Her practice discovers elegance within ordinary experience.
stories.summary_de: Kiah Celestes Skulpturenarbeit im Studio Museum erforscht das Vertraute als Transzendentes. Ihre Praxis entdeckt Eleganz innerhalb alltäglicher Erfahrung.

stories.headline_en: Heike Geißler reimagines Kleist's Michael Kohlhaas
stories.headline_de: Heike Geißler interpretiert Kleists Michael Kohlhaas neu
stories.summary_en: Author Heike Geißler explores what Heinrich von Kleist's 'Michael Kohlhaas' would sound like with a female protagonist. The work examines rigid righteousness in world literature.

stories.headline_en: Thadde Comar documents Hong Kong protests

stories.headline_en: Prince-inspired bar Dive opens in Marylebone
stories.headline_de: Prince-inspirierte Bar Dive in Marylebone
stories.summary_en: A new bar called Dive has opened in London's Marylebone with a Prince-inspired cocktail menu. The venue features cocooning interiors and sophisticated sound curation.
stories.summary_de: Eine neue Bar namens Dive eröffnet in Londons Marylebone mit einem Prince-inspirierten Cocktail-Menü. Das Lokal bietet gemütliche Innenräume und gehobene Musikkuration.

stories.headline_en: Basel Social Club Explores the World of Work
stories.headline_de: Basel Social Club erforscht die Arbeitswelt
stories.summary_en: The Basel Social Club, an alternative fair and exhibition during Art Basel, presents works by Marina Abramović, Maurizio Cattelan, and Valie Export. The program aims to understand the world of work.

stories.summary_de: Führende Künstler wie Rachel Whiteread und Michael Armitage teilen Ansätze zur kreativen Kinderbetreuung und zur Einführung von Kindern in die Kunst. Sie diskutieren Strategien von Küchenaktivitäten bis zu Museumsbesuche

stories.headline_de: Künstlerin verarbeitet Heimat nach LA-Waldbränden

stories.headline_de: Leonardos Codex Atlanticus nach 400 Jahren vereinigt

stories.headline_en: Spectrosynthesis IV celebrates queer art in Asia
stories.headline_de: Spectrosynthesis IV würdigt queere Kunst in Asien

stories.headline_en: Ruth Artmonsky, 1932–2026
stories.headline_de: Ruth Artmonsky, 1932–2026
stories.summary_en: Ruth Artmonsky, gallery founder and art author, has died aged 94. After co-founding Saville & Holdsworth, she established Artmonsky Arts gallery in St John's Wood and authored 36 books on art, design, and advertising.
stories.summary_de: Ruth Artmonsky, Galeristin und Kunsthistorikerin, ist im Alter von 94 Jahren verstorben. Nach der Mitgründung von Saville & Holdsworth eröffnete sie die Artmonsky Arts Galerie in St John's Wood.

stories.headline_en: Chef Daniel Patterson Opens Jacaranda
stories.headline_de: Chef Daniel Patterson eröffnet Jacaranda
stories.summary_en: Celebrated Los Angeles chef Daniel Patterson has launched Jacaranda restaurant following a successful pop-up. The venue combines fine dining with a relaxed dinner party atmosphere.
stories.summary_de: Der gefeierte Los-Angeles-Chef Daniel Patterson hat das Restaurant Jacaranda eröffnet. Das Lokal verbindet gehobenes Dining mit entspannter Dinner-Party-Atmosphäre.

stories.headline_en: Scurati's final Mussolini novel published

stories.summary_en: Antonio Scurati's monumental novel cycle about Benito Mussolini concludes with the publication of "M". The series has profoundly altered Italy's perspective on its past.

stories.headline_en: Agencies help Americans emigrate to Europe
stories.headline_de: Agenturen helfen Amerikanern bei Auswanderung
stories.summary_en: Agencies now assist Americans seeking to relocate and emigrate to Europe, reversing a historical pattern. The trend reflects changing attitudes toward living abroad.
stories.summary_de: Agenturen unterstützen jetzt Amerikaner, die sich nach Europa umsiedeln möchten, was einen historischen Trend umkehrt. Der Trend spiegelt sich in veränderten Einstellungen zur Auswanderung wider.

stories.headline_en: Ginsberg and Maier at Howard Greenberg
stories.headline_de: Ginsberg und Maier bei Howard Greenberg
stories.summary_en: Howard Greenberg Gallery presents works by Allen Ginsberg and Vivian Maier, artists whose practice emerged from social margins. Both left lasting marks on cultural imagination.
stories.summary_de: Howard Greenberg Gallery präsentiert Werke von Allen Ginsberg und Vivian Maier, deren künstlerisches Schaffen am sozialen Rand entstand. Beide hinterließen bleibende Spuren in der Kulturgeschichte.

stories.headline_de: Mildred Howard Retrospektive im Oakland Museum

stories.headline_en: Schimmelpfennig's Premiere Stages Inheritance Battle

stories.summary_en: Roland Schimmelpfennig's "Sommersonnenwende" premiered in Stuttgart, exploring family conflict beneath comedic surface. The play dramatizes a dispute over inheritance.

stories.headline_en: Elfie Semotan dies at 84
stories.headline_de: Elfie Semotan mit 84 Jahren verstorben
stories.summary_en: Elfie Semotan has died at age 84. Further details about her life and work are not provided in the source.

stories.headline_en: Fillières' Children Complete Unfinished Tragicomedy
stories.headline_de: Fillières' Kinder vollenden unvollendete Tragikomödie
stories.summary_en: French director Sophie Fillières died before completing her tragicomedy "Mein Leben, mein Ding". Her children finished the film.

stories.headline_en: Maxim Gorki Theater Faces Rent Crisis

stories.summary_de: Leser reagieren auf einen Artikel über Überbestandsaufstellung in Galerien und argumentieren, dass kleinere, fokussierte Sammlungen wie die Frick Collection und die Dulwich Picture Gallery befriedigendere Erlebnisse biet

stories.headline_en: Kolbe Museum Fountain Sells for Four Million
stories.headline_de: Kolbe-Museum Brunnen für vier Millionen versteigert

stories.summary_de: Ein Brunnen aus dem Kolbe-Museum wurde für vier Millionen Euro versteigert.

stories.headline_en: Marjane Satrapi Dies at 56
stories.headline_de: Marjane Satrapi verstorben
stories.summary_en: Marjane Satrapi, author and filmmaker, has died at 56. According to a friend, she died of sadness following her husband's death over a year ago.

stories.headline_en: French Study: Bayeux Tapestry Safe to Ship

stories.summary_en: A French study concludes it is safe to ship the Bayeux Tapestry to the British Museum, with main risks from vibrations and handling. The move has been carefully choreographed to address these concerns.
stories.summary_de: Eine französische Studie kommt zu dem Ergebnis, dass der Bayeux-Wandteppich zum British Museum transportiert werden kann, wobei die Hauptrisiken von Vibrationen und Handhabung ausgehen. Der Transport wurde bis ins Detail

stories.headline_en: Philippe Vergne becomes Artistic Director of the Bass
stories.headline_de: Philippe Vergne wird künstlerischer Direktor des Bass
stories.summary_en: Philippe Vergne has been named Artistic Director of the Bass in Miami Beach. The appointment marks a return to curating for the museum leader.

stories.headline_en: Pope to Inaugurate Sagrada Família After 144 Years

stories.summary_en: Pope Leo XIV will visit Barcelona's Sagrada Familia later this month to inaugurate and bless the Tower of Jesus Christ. The basilica's construction has spanned 144 years.
stories.summary_de: Papst Leo XIV wird Barcelona später diesen Monat besuchen, um die Sagrada Familia einzuweihen und den Jesusturm zu segnen. Der Bau der Basilika erstreckt sich über 144 Jahre.

stories.headline_en: Black photographers exhibition at Getty offers new perspective
stories.headline_de: Ausstellung schwarzer Fotografen bei Getty bietet neue Perspektive
stories.summary_en: An exhibition at The Getty featuring Black photographers provided the author with unexpected insights into a subject previously thought well-understood. The show prompted a reconsideration of familiar themes.
stories.summary_de: Eine Ausstellung schwarzer Fotografen bei The Getty bot dem Autor unerwartete Einblicke in ein zuvor gut verstandenes Thema. Die Schau führte zu einer Neubewertung bekannter Themen.

stories.headline_en: Lego builds 12,000-piece Sagrada Família set
stories.headline_de: Lego baut Sagrada Família mit 12.000 Steinen
stories.summary_en: Lego releases its most ambitious architectural set, a representation of Antoni Gaudí's Barcelona masterpiece made from over 12,000 pieces. The brick-built cathedral is showcased in detail.

stories.headline_en: Marjane Satrapi, 'Persepolis' Director, Dies

stories.summary_de: Marjane Satrapi, Regisseurin des animated Biografiefilms 'Persepolis' über das Aufwachsen im Iran nach der Revolution, ist mit 56 Jahren gestorben. Der Film erhielt eine Oscar-Nominierung und machte sie zur ersten Frau i

stories.headline_en: Pace cuts 50 staff and 50 artists amid market downturn
stories.headline_de: Pace streicht 50 Mitarbeiter und 50 Künstler bei Marktabschwung
stories.summary_en: Pace gallery has laid off 50 workers and reduced its roster by 50 artists, citing a 'broken' gallery business model. The cuts follow market uncertainty and the collapse of crypto-backed art ventures.

stories.headline_en: Venice Biennale faces artists' lawsuit over awards
stories.headline_de: Venedig Biennale vor Künstlerklage wegen Preise
stories.summary_en: Artists accuse La Biennale of ignoring their withdrawal requests, escalating an awards controversy that has affected this year's exhibition. The dispute centres on the handling of award nominations.

stories.headline_en: Philippe Vergne Named Artistic Director at Bass
stories.headline_de: Philippe Vergne neuer Künstlerischer Leiter in Miami
stories.summary_en: Philippe Vergne has joined Miami's Bass Museum as Artistic Director and Chief Curator. Since 2019 he has led Portugal's Serralves Museum of Contemporary Art.

stories.headline_de: Pace-Chef: Expansionsmodell für Mega-Galerien 'nicht zu reparieren'
stories.summary_en: Marc Glimcher, chief executive of Pace, argues that constant expansion and rising primary market prices are unsustainable for mega galleries. He suggests that shrinking may become the next growth strategy.
stories.summary_de: Marc Glimcher, Geschäftsführer von Pace, argumentiert, dass ständige Expansion und steigende Preise auf dem Primärmarkt für Mega-Galerien unhaltbar sind. Er deutet an, dass Schrumpfung die nächste Wachstumsstrategie werd

stories.headline_en: MC Escher at Somerset House: Geometry & War
stories.headline_de: MC Escher in Somerset House: Geometrie & Krieg

stories.headline_en: Actor Axel Schreiber dies at 49
stories.headline_de: Schauspieler Axel Schreiber gestorben
stories.summary_en: German actor Axel Schreiber, known for the ARD series "Türkisch für Anfänger," has died at age 49 following cancer.

stories.headline_en: Marlene A. Schenk Named Director of Rebecca Horn Foundation
stories.headline_de: Marlene A. Schenk neue Direktorin von Rebecca Horns Stiftung

stories.headline_en: HP and Ferrari collaborate on luxury laptop

stories.headline_en: Bass Museum appoints Vergne as artistic director
stories.headline_de: Bass Museum ernennt Vergne zum künstlerischen Direktor
stories.summary_en: Philippe Vergne, currently director of Serralves Museum of Contemporary Art, has been hired as artistic director and chief curator of Miami Beach's Bass Museum. Vergne previously led the Dia Art Foundation and Moca Los A
stories.summary_de: Philippe Vergne, derzeit Direktor des Serralves Museums für zeitgenössische Kunst, wurde zum künstlerischen Direktor und Chefkurator des Bass Museum in Miami Beach ernannt. Vergne leitete zuvor die Dia Art Foundation und

stories.headline_en: Museum Mile Festival returns to Fifth Avenue
stories.headline_de: Museum Mile Festival auf der Fifth Avenue

stories.headline_en: Kulapat Yantrasast Named Director of 2027 Bukhara Biennial

stories.headline_de: Gen Z sehnt sich nach Merkel-Zeit zurück
stories.summary_en: Young Germans too young to vote during Angela Merkel's chancellorship increasingly wish her return. A cultural analysis examines what this reveals about Merkel and contemporary times.

stories.headline_en: Venice Biennale artists pursue legal action over unwanted Lions nominations

stories.summary_en: Artists included in the Venice Biennale's 'Visitors' Lions' ballots have publicly rejected consideration for the awards. They are now pursuing legal actions against their inclusion.

stories.headline_en: Kulapat Yantrasast to direct 2027 Bukhara Biennial

stories.summary_de: Das Center for Photography at Woodstock eröffnete die erste New York Upstate Photography Biennial mit Werken von 39 Künstlern aus der Hudson-Valley-Region, kuratiert von Marina Chao und Adam Giles Ryan. Die Ausstellung l

stories.headline_en: John Lennon drawings from 1964 debut publicly

stories.summary_de: Steffani Jemisons Kunstwerke erforschen alternative Literalität als Widerstandsinstrument. ARTnews präsentiert Bücher aus ihrer Sammlung.

stories.headline_en: Kyung-Me opens new work at Bureau, New York
